compiled_state.title: test-bridge-observability-e2e.sh fails intermittently in full test suite but passes in isolation
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description: test-bridge-observability-e2e.sh fails when run as part of the full test-batched.sh suite but passes when run alone. Likely a test ordering or shared state issue causing interference from a prior test. Root cause unknown - needs investigation to identify the shared resource or global state being contaminated.
